zh.lifeSummary: 當sir Albert Oliver Hyde於1461年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯時，他的父親John Hyde II22歲，母親Lady Margaret Booth26歲。他於1478年與Anne Agnes Lovingcote在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年10月4日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当sir Albert Oliver Hyde于1461年出生在英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯时，他的父亲John Hyde II22岁，母亲Lady Margaret Booth26岁。他于1478年与Anne Agnes Lovingcote在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年10月4日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Albert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: When sir Albert Oliver Hyde was born in 1461, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hyde II, was 22 and his mother, Lady Margaret Booth, was 26. He married Anne Agnes Lovingcote in 1478, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 4 October 1516, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque sir Albert Oliver Hyde est né en 1461, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hyde II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Booth, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anne Agnes Lovingcote en 1478, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1516, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1478 in Oxfordshire, England Anne Agnes Lovingcote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1516 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxford, England: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: sir Albert Oliver Hyde(이)가 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hyde II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Booth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1478년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Anne Agnes Lovingcote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 10월 4일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Anne Agnes Lovingcote em 1478, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1516, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Vale of White Horse, Oxford, England: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда sir Albert Oliver Hyde родился в 1461 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hyde II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Booth, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Agnes Lovingcote в 1478 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 4 октября 1516 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Anne Agnes Lovingcote en 1478, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1516, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
